response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or team scaling beyond 10 engineers — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven track record building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions via workshops, TDD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments or credit/risk systems
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or governing hybrid external teams
No mention of real-time inference, streaming data pipelines, or LLM evaluation infrastructure in production
